name: Quick Shrimp Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tomatoes and their liquid until smooth.
2. In a skillet, make a roux with flour and butter.
3. Add minced garlic and continue to brown until tender.
4. Add the blended tomatoes, shrimp, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Stir in chopped parsley before removing from heat.
Serve over hot fluffy rice.
